artifact_summary: This artifact is a screenshot of a SCADA system faceplate displaying the control interface for Sump Pump No.1. It captures specific operational states including control source, motor running status, and motor enable logic.
artifact_blurb: This screenshot displays a Constant Speed Motor Faceplate for Sump Pump No.1 (ID: H-010-DC400-114-01) within a SCADA system. The interface is divided into sections for Control Source, Motor Status, and Control Status, showing options for Operator Mode, Motor Running, and Motor Enabled logic. Navigation icons for home, dashboard, settings, alerts, and graphs are visible at the top.
